field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: For the analysis of the PLA’s LC-CC conditions have been used corresponding to silica gel as the stationary phase and a mixture of 1,4-dioxane/n-hexane (56.25/43.75 by vol%) at 50 8C as the mobile phase.
field_evidence.critical_component: For the analysis of the PLA’s LC-CC conditions have been used corresponding to silica gel as the stationary phase and a mixture of 1,4-dioxane/n-hexane (56.25/43.75 by vol%) at 50 8C as the mobile phase.
field_evidence.pore_size: average pore sizes of 100 and 300 Å

conditions.physical_address: Department of Polymer Chemistry, Center of Molecular and Macromolecular Studies, Polish Academy of Sciences, Sienkiewicza 112, PL-90-363 Lodz, Poland; Deutsches Kunststoff-Institut (German Institute for Polymers), Schlossgartenstrasse 6, D-64289 Darmstadt, Germany
conditions.detector: Waters 486 tunable UV detector operating at 235 nm
conditions.notes: Critical conditions established for linear PLA backbone to analyze star-shaped PLA end-groups.
